steps.title: Pick two clear points on the line of best fit
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the line of best fit slopes downward from left to right. Two readable points on the line are $(0, 8)$ near the y-axis and $(10, 1)$ further to the right.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $7$ — a slope of $7$ would mean the line rises sharply (up 7 for every 1 right). The line clearly goes down, not up. Incorrect.
  • Choice B: $0.7$ — positive, so the line would rise. Our line falls. Incorrect.
  • Choice C: $-0.7$ — negative and gentle, matching a line that drops about 7 units over a horizontal span of 10. Correct.
  • Choice D: $-7$ — negative but far too steep; the line would plunge nearly vertically. Incorrect.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
